description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that composes its configuration from multiple local include files: .gitlab/ci/yaml/_common.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/yaml/_rules.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/yaml/prepare.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/yaml/validate.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/yaml/build.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/yaml/release.gitlab-ci.yml, and .gitlab/ci/yaml/postrelease.gitlab-ci.yml. Define the pipeline stages in order: prepare, validate, build, release, and postrelease. The included files will supply the jobs, Docker images, scripts, caches, artifacts, and rules for each stage. Ensure the pipeline relies solely on these includes without adding extra jobs directly.
